text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch... This was way beyond the margin of error...
and not in a good way.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Fine! I'll just rewrite the whole damn program
from scratch!
choice_data_list: Let's take it easy—no need to rush.
Let's work on improving it together.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I don't need a lecture, thank you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...That said, you're not wrong. I'm not gonna write
any good code while I'm this stressed.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Let's get back right away. I'll cool my head for a
minute and then take a look at the program.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You're so annoying that you've looped around
into being hilarious. You plannin' on helping me
debug?
choice_data_list: I believe in what you can do.
I believe in what you can do.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I take it back—you're not funny at all. So you
don't have any concrete solutions?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Fine. If you believe in me so much, that means
you'll stay outta my way, right? Sit tight and
watch while I figure it out myself.
